Petition To Confirm Trust And Ownership Of Real Property
Off Calendar Sep-25-2018 Continued To Oct-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Confirm Trust And Ownership Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Continued To Sep-25-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ashley Sundar appeared by telephone for Andrew Leeds (Trustee).
Evan Winet and Deb Kinney for John Barnaby (Surviving Spouse).

The Court noted that the Parties have a dispute as to whether the property was held in joint tenancy and passes through right of survivorship, or not. Mr. Winet stated that the Parties have had discussion, but it was not productive as to finding a solution. Ms. Sundar stated that her thought is to continue the matter for two to three months, or obtain a trial date to allow the Parties to move forward. Mr. Winet stated that he sees no purpose of a prolonged proceeding and it is clear the deed is complete onto itself, or extrinsic evidence can be submitted. The Court inquires as to whether the Parties would be interested in Pro Bono Mediation. Ms. Sundar stated that she is agreeable to mediation. Ms. Kinney stated that the charities want a decision, but she can agree to mediation between the Trustee and Spouse. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than September 18, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by September 20, 2018. The Petition to Confirm Trust and Ownership of Real Property is continued to and the Parties are to return on September 25, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. If the matter is not resolved, the Parties are to have met and conferred to know if they are ready to set a final hearing and what needs to be accomplished.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
